history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A mystical, ethereal male character with long, flowing silver hair, wearing an ornate, wide-brimmed conical hat adorned with intricate patterns and sharp protrusions. His attire is a dark, layered garment with metallic blue and silver accents, featuring detailed embroidery and what appear to be gemstone embellishments. The character's face is finely rendered with delicate features, fair skin, and a thoughtful, serene expression, looking slightly to the left. Behind him, a large, luminous full moon hangs in a cloudy, deep blue sky, creating a dramatic and atmospheric backdrop. The lighting is soft and diffused, with a cool color palette dominated by blues, silvers, and grays, evoking a sense of mystery, fantasy, and tranquility. The overall style is that of high-quality 3D animation or digital art, with a focus on intricate details and a painterly quality.
